payload.title: [LOW] OIDC discovery SSRF if issuer ever becomes non-static
payload.description: discover() fetches ${SCOPE_OIDC_ISSUER}/.well-known/... with no host validation; today issuer is operator-env only (not attacker-influenceable) so reachability is low. FIX (defense-in-depth for future per-tenant SSO): allowlist + block link-local/RFC1918/loopback before fetching.
